CREATE TABLE t1 (array1 ARRAY<FLOAT>, array2 ARRAY<FLOAT>);
SELECT array_dot_product(array1, array2) FROM t1 WHERE array_length(array1) = array_length(array2);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT, array1 ARRAY<FLOAT>, array2 ARRAY<FLOAT>);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1, ARRAY[1.0, 1.0], ARRAY[2.0, 2.0]), (2, ARRAY[2.0, 2.0], ARRAY[3.0, 3.0]);
SELECT id, array_dot_product(array1, array2) AS dot_product FROM t2;
SELECT ARRAY(SELECT array_dot_product(array1, array2) FROM t1 WHERE array_length(array1) > 1);
SELECT (SELECT array_dot_product(array1, array2) FROM t1) + (SELECT array_dot_product(array1, array2) FROM t2) AS combined_product;
WITH temp AS (SELECT array1, array2 FROM t1 WHERE array_length(array1) = 3) SELECT array_dot_product(array1, array2) FROM temp;
SELECT array_dot_product(ARRAY[1, 1, 1], ARRAY[1, 2, 3]) FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy;
